name: Generate Monthly Financial Reports with AI Analysis
description: Reads financial data from a Google Sheet, uses Claude AI to generate comprehensive financial analysis with trends and recommendations, creates an HTML report, sends the report via Gmail, and posts a summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Generate monthly financial reports with Gemini AI, SQL, and Outlook

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for financial data source

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending reports

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID containing financial data

dataRange.description: Sheet range containing financial data (columns: Date, Category, Description, Amount, Type, Account)

reportRecipient.description: Email address to send the financial report to

companyName.description: Company name for the report header

steps.name: Read financial data from Google Sheets
Build Claude prompt for financial analysis

code.source:
const d = $.steps.processFinancialData.output;
const company = $.input.companyName || 'Company';

const prompt = 'You are a senior financial analyst. Generate a comprehensive monthly financial report.

COMPANY: ' + company + '

FINANCIAL SUMMARY:
- Total Income: $' + d.totalIncome.toFixed(2) + '
- Total Expenses: $' + d.totalExpenses.toFixed(2) + '
- Net Income: $' + d.netIncome.toFixed(2) + '
- Transactions: ' + d.transactionCount + '

BY CATEGORY:
' + d.catSummary + '

TRANSACTION DATA:
' + d.dataText + '

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "reportTitle": "Monthly Financial Report - ' + company + '",
  "period": "report period description",
  "executiveSummary": "2-3 sentence executive summary",
  "revenueAnalysis": { "total": 0, "trend": "up/down/stable", "insights": ["insight1"] },
  "expenseAnalysis": { "total": 0, "topCategories": [{ "name": "cat", "amount": 0, "percentage": "0%" }], "insights": ["insight1"] },
  "profitability": { "netIncome": 0, "margin": "0%", "assessment": "assessment text" },
  "trends": ["trend 1", "trend 2"],
  "recommendations": [{ "priority": "high/medium/low", "action": "recommendation" }],
  "risks": ["risk 1"],
  "outlook": "next month outlook"
}';

return { prompt };

steps.name: Generate financial analysis with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
